instruction: Summarize the CVE description using clear cybersecurity language.
input: A denial service vulnerability has been found on  Hex Workshop affecting version 6.7, an attacker could send a command line file arguments and control the Structured Exception Handler (SEH) records resulting in a service shutdown.
output: A denial of service (DoS) vulnerability in Hex Workshop version 6.7 allows an attacker to manipulate Structured Exception Handler (SEH) records via command line file arguments, causing the service to shut down.
